drinks.name: Pike Place / Drip Coffee
drinks.desc: Starbucks' signature medium roast, brewed fresh every 30 minutes. Bold, smooth, and completely clean. The simplest zero-sugar order on the menu.
drinks.order: Pike Place roast, black — no milk, no syrup.
drinks.app: Select Brewed Coffee → Milk: None → Sweeteners: remove all.

drinks.name: Caffè Americano
drinks.desc: Espresso shots diluted with hot water. Bold espresso flavor with a lighter body. One of the cleanest drinks on the menu.
drinks.order: Caffè Americano — no syrup, no milk.
drinks.app: Select Caffè Americano → Milk: None → Flavors: remove all.

drinks.name: Espresso Shot(s)
drinks.desc: Pure concentrated espresso. Intensely rich with notes of caramel and dark chocolate. Two shots is the standard double.
drinks.order: Double shot of espresso — nothing added.
drinks.app: Select Espresso from the menu.

drinks.name: Espresso Macchiato
drinks.desc: Espresso "marked" with just a small dollop of milk foam. Intense espresso with the faintest whisper of creaminess.
drinks.order: Espresso Macchiato — no syrup.
drinks.app: Select Espresso Macchiato → Flavors: remove all.

drinks.name: Cappuccino
drinks.desc: Equal parts espresso, steamed milk, and thick foam. The Italian classic. Almond milk keeps sugar low while maintaining creamy texture.
drinks.order: Cappuccino — almond milk, no syrup.
drinks.app: Select Cappuccino → Milk: Almond Milk → Flavors: remove all.
drinks.milkNote: Almond milk (~5g/cup) is the lowest-sugar steaming option at Starbucks. Sub heavy cream for near-zero sugar, though texture will change.

drinks.name: Caffè Latte
drinks.desc: Smooth espresso with steamed milk and a light layer of foam. The everyday classic, made clean with almond milk and no syrup.
drinks.order: Caffè Latte — almond milk, no syrup.
drinks.app: Select Caffè Latte → Milk: Almond Milk → Flavors: remove all.
drinks.milkNote: Almond milk (~5g) is lowest. For near-zero sugar, ask for a splash of heavy cream instead (~1g).

drinks.name: Flat White
drinks.desc: Ristretto shots over velvety microfoam. Stronger and silkier than a latte, with a bolder espresso punch.
drinks.order: Flat White — almond milk, no syrup.
drinks.app: Select Flat White → Milk: Almond Milk → Flavors: remove all.
drinks.milkNote: Almond milk (~5g) is lowest. Sub heavy cream splash for near-zero.

drinks.name: Caffè Misto
drinks.desc: Half brewed drip coffee, half steamed milk. Lighter than a latte. Only half a cup of milk means lower sugar.
drinks.order: Caffè Misto — almond milk, no syrup.
drinks.app: Select Caffè Misto → Milk: Almond Milk.
drinks.milkNote: Half cup of almond milk means only ~2.5g sugar. Sub half heavy cream for near-zero.

drinks.name: Sugar-Free Vanilla Latte
drinks.desc: A sweet, creamy latte without the sugar. Uses sucralose-sweetened vanilla syrup for that classic vanilla flavor.
drinks.order: Caffè Latte — almond milk, sugar-free vanilla syrup, no other syrups.
drinks.app: Select Caffè Latte → Milk: Almond Milk → Flavors: Sugar-Free Vanilla Syrup, remove all others.
drinks.note: Sugar-free vanilla syrup is available at most locations but can occasionally be out of stock. If unavailable, ask for a plain almond milk latte or add Stevia/Splenda from the condiment bar.
drinks.milkNote: Almond milk (~5g). For near-zero: heavy cream + sugar-free vanilla.

drinks.name: Sugar-Free Caramel Latte
drinks.desc: New as of January 2026 — sugar-free caramel syrup is now a year-round menu item. Warm, buttery caramel flavor without added sugar.
drinks.order: Caffè Latte — almond milk, sugar-free caramel syrup, no other syrups.
drinks.app: Select Caffè Latte → Milk: Almond Milk → Flavors: Sugar-Free Caramel Syrup, remove all others.
drinks.note: Sugar-free caramel was added to the year-round menu in January 2026. Confirm availability with your barista as some locations may still be stocking it.
drinks.milkNote: Almond milk (~5g). Sub heavy cream for near-zero.

drinks.name: DIY Sugar-Free Chai Latte
drinks.desc: All the warm spice of chai — cinnamon, ginger, cardamom — without the 42g of sugar in the standard version. Made with the plain tea bag, not the concentrate.
drinks.order: Chai tea bag steeped in steamed almond milk — add sugar-free vanilla syrup and cinnamon powder.
drinks.app: Select Hot Tea → Chai Tea and add a note: "Steam with almond milk, add sugar-free vanilla, add cinnamon. No concentrate."
drinks.note: ⚠️ The standard Chai Latte uses a pre-sweetened concentrate with 42g of sugar. Request the tea bag method specifically.
drinks.milkNote: Almond milk (~5g) works best here for steaming and texture.

drinks.name: Iced Caffè Americano
drinks.desc: Bold espresso shots over ice with cold water. Crisp, refreshing, and completely clean.
drinks.order: Iced Caffè Americano — no syrup, no milk.
drinks.app: Select Iced Caffè Americano → Milk: None → Flavors: remove all.

drinks.name: Iced Caffè Latte
drinks.desc: Espresso and cold almond milk poured over ice. Smooth and satisfying.
drinks.order: Iced Caffè Latte — almond milk, no syrup.
drinks.app: Select Iced Caffè Latte → Milk: Almond Milk → Flavors: remove all.
drinks.milkNote: Almond milk (~5g). Sub heavy cream splash for near-zero.

drinks.name: Iced Flat White
drinks.desc: Ristretto shots over ice with almond milk. More concentrated espresso than an iced latte.
drinks.order: Iced Flat White — almond milk, no syrup.
drinks.app: Select Iced Flat White → Milk: Almond Milk → Flavors: remove all.
drinks.milkNote: Almond milk (~5g). Sub heavy cream splash for near-zero.

drinks.name: Iced Coffee (Sugar-Free)
drinks.desc: Chilled brewed coffee over ice. The default classic syrup is swapped for sugar-free vanilla.
drinks.order: Iced Coffee — almond milk, no classic syrup, sugar-free vanilla syrup.
drinks.app: Select Iced Coffee → Milk: Almond Milk → Sweeteners: remove Classic Syrup → Flavors: Sugar-Free Vanilla Syrup.
drinks.note: ⚠️ Iced Coffee comes with classic syrup by default. Always confirm "no classic syrup."
drinks.milkNote: Almond milk (~5g). Sub heavy cream for near-zero.

drinks.name: Iced Sugar-Free Vanilla Latte
drinks.desc: Cold espresso with almond milk and sugar-free vanilla over ice. Creamy and subtly sweet.
drinks.order: Iced Caffè Latte — almond milk, sugar-free vanilla syrup, no other syrups.
drinks.app: Select Iced Caffè Latte → Milk: Almond Milk → Flavors: Sugar-Free Vanilla Syrup, remove all others.
drinks.milkNote: Almond milk (~5g). Sub heavy cream for near-zero.

drinks.name: Iced Shaken Espresso (SF)
drinks.desc: Espresso shaken with ice for a frothy texture. Brown sugar replaced with sugar-free vanilla.
drinks.order: Iced Shaken Espresso — almond milk, sugar-free vanilla syrup, no brown sugar syrup.
drinks.app: Select Iced Shaken Espresso → Milk: Almond Milk → Flavors: remove Brown Sugar Syrup, add Sugar-Free Vanilla Syrup.
drinks.note: ⚠️ Brown Sugar Syrup is not available sugar-free and must be removed entirely.
drinks.milkNote: Almond milk (~5g). Sub heavy cream for near-zero, though it changes texture.

drinks.name: Cold Brew (Black)
drinks.desc: Steeped in cold water for 20 hours. Incredibly smooth with natural sweetness and zero bitterness. One of the best zero-sugar options on the menu.
drinks.order: Cold Brew — black, no classic syrup.
drinks.app: Select Cold Brew → Milk: None → Sweeteners: remove Classic Syrup.
drinks.note: ⚠️ Classic syrup is added to Cold Brew by default at many locations. Always say "no classic syrup."

drinks.name: Nitro Cold Brew
drinks.desc: Cold brew infused with nitrogen on tap. The nitrogen creates a creamy, velvety texture and subtle natural sweetness — all with zero sugar. One of the best drinks on the entire menu.
drinks.order: Nitro Cold Brew — nothing added. Order as-is.
drinks.app: Select Nitro Cold Brew — no modifications needed. Do not add anything.
drinks.note: Available at most corporate Starbucks. May not be available at licensed locations (airports, grocery stores, etc.).

drinks.name: Cold Brew + Heavy Cream
drinks.desc: Cold brew with a splash of heavy cream. Rich, creamy, and the single best near-zero-sugar milk option at Starbucks.
drinks.order: Cold Brew — splash of heavy cream, no classic syrup.
drinks.app: Select Cold Brew → Milk: Heavy Cream → Sweeteners: remove Classic Syrup.
drinks.note: Heavy cream is the best low-sugar milk option at Starbucks (~1g per 2 tbsp). Say "light splash" if you want less.

drinks.name: Mint Majesty
drinks.desc: A blend of peppermint and spearmint. Refreshing, calming, caffeine-free, and completely sugar-free.
drinks.order: Mint Majesty — hot water and tea bag only. No syrup.
drinks.app: Select Mint Majesty under Hot Teas. No modifications needed.

drinks.name: Peach Tranquility
drinks.desc: A fruity herbal blend of peach, rose hips, and chamomile. Naturally sweet-smelling, caffeine-free, zero sugar.
drinks.order: Peach Tranquility — hot water and tea bag only. No syrup.
drinks.app: Select Peach Tranquility under Hot Teas. No modifications needed.

drinks.name: Emperor's Clouds & Mist
drinks.desc: A Chinese green tea with a delicate, misty flavor. Light, slightly vegetal, and refreshing.
drinks.order: Emperor's Clouds & Mist — hot water and tea bag only. No syrup.
drinks.app: Select Emperor's Clouds & Mist under Hot Teas. No modifications.

drinks.name: Royal English Breakfast
drinks.desc: A robust, full-bodied black tea blend with a rich malty character. The classic British morning tea.
drinks.order: Royal English Breakfast Tea — hot water and tea bag only. No syrup.
drinks.app: Select Royal English Breakfast → Sweeteners: remove all.

drinks.name: Jade Citrus Mint
drinks.desc: Green tea with spearmint, lemongrass, and lemon verbena. Bright, herbal, and gently refreshing.
drinks.order: Jade Citrus Mint — hot water and tea bag only. No syrup.
drinks.app: Select Jade Citrus Mint under Hot Teas → Sweeteners: remove all.

drinks.name: Chai Tea (Bag Only)
drinks.desc: The plain chai spice tea bag in hot water. Naturally warming with cinnamon, ginger, and cardamom. Zero sugar — completely different from the Chai Latte.
drinks.order: Chai Tea — hot water and tea bag only. NOT the Chai Latte.
drinks.app: Select Chai Tea under Hot Teas (not Chai Latte). No modifications.
drinks.note: ⚠️ The Chai Latte uses a pre-sweetened concentrate with 42g of sugar. Request "plain chai tea bag, just hot water."

drinks.name: Iced Black Tea (Unsweetened)
drinks.desc: Chilled black tea over ice. Bold, slightly tannic, and completely clean without the default syrup.
drinks.order: Iced Black Tea — unsweetened, no classic syrup.
drinks.app: Select Iced Black Tea → Sweeteners: remove Classic Syrup → "Unsweetened."
drinks.note: ⚠️ All iced teas come sweetened by default. Always say "unsweetened, no classic syrup."

drinks.name: Iced Green Tea (Unsweetened)
drinks.desc: Light, grassy green tea over ice. Delicate and refreshing when ordered without the default syrup.
drinks.order: Iced Green Tea — unsweetened, no classic syrup.
drinks.app: Select Iced Green Tea → Sweeteners: remove Classic Syrup → "Unsweetened."
drinks.note: ⚠️ Comes sweetened by default. Always specify "unsweetened, no classic syrup."

drinks.name: Iced Passion Tango Tea
drinks.desc: Hibiscus, lemongrass, and apple herbal blend over ice. Vibrantly pink, fruity, caffeine-free, and zero sugar when unsweetened.
drinks.order: Iced Passion Tango Tea — unsweetened, no classic syrup.
drinks.app: Select Iced Passion Tango Tea → Sweeteners: remove Classic Syrup → "Unsweetened."
drinks.note: ⚠️ Comes sweetened by default. Always specify "unsweetened, no classic syrup."

drinks.name: Sugar-Free London Fog Latte
drinks.desc: Earl Grey tea steeped in warm almond milk with sugar-free vanilla. Floral, creamy, and elegantly low-sugar.
drinks.order: London Fog Tea Latte — almond milk, sugar-free vanilla syrup, no regular vanilla syrup.
drinks.app: Select London Fog Tea Latte → Milk: Almond Milk → Flavors: replace Vanilla Syrup with Sugar-Free Vanilla Syrup.
drinks.milkNote: Almond milk (~5g) is the lowest-sugar steaming option available at Starbucks.

drinks.name: DIY Iced SF Chai Latte
drinks.desc: Cold chai spice tea with almond milk and sugar-free vanilla over ice — without the 42g of sugar in the standard version.
drinks.order: Chai tea bag over ice in almond milk — sugar-free vanilla syrup, cinnamon powder.
drinks.app: Order Iced Chai Tea Latte and add a note: "Tea bag method, not concentrate. Almond milk, sugar-free vanilla syrup, cinnamon."
drinks.note: ⚠️ Standard Iced Chai Latte uses a sweetened concentrate (42g sugar). Request the tea bag method explicitly.
drinks.milkNote: Almond milk (~5g) is the best cold milk option for this drink.
